betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Schrabidium Creation§f

§aMultiple paths to the iconic transuranic — from nuclear bombs to particle accelerators!§f

§bSchrabidium§f is a highly radioactive superactinide used for nuclear fuels, tools, armor, and exotic materials. It can be produced through several methods, each with distinct trade-offs.

§6Method 1§f: Nuclear Explosion
Detonate a nuclear explosive near uranium ore. Each block has §e10%§f chance to become schrabidium ore, §e90%§f to become scorched (unusable).
§bPros§f: High conversion rate
§bCons§f: Scars landscape, impossible to automate

§6Method 2§f: Dirty Bomb
Destroy a nuclear waste barrel with an explosive near uranium ore. Small chance to convert. Best done in a concrete enclosure.
§bPros§f: Cheap materials
§bCons§f: §e1%§f conversion rate, impossible to automate

§6Method 3§f: Cyclotron
Bombard ionized particles (fusion byproduct) with plutonium dust in a cyclotron → §e1 schrabidium nugget§f.
§bPros§f: Contained, single machine
§bCons§f: Requires fusion reactor, net power negative

§6Method 4§f: Higgs Boson Exposure (Best)
Expose §e8 uranium-238 ingots§f to a Higgs Boson capsule in the Exposure Chamber → §e8 schrabidium ingots§f at §e100%§f efficiency.
Recipe: Uranium-238 Ingot×8 + Higgs Boson Capsule → Schrabidium Ingot×8
§bPros§f: 1:1 conversion, easily automatable
§bCons§f: Requires particle accelerator, ~100 MHE per operation

§6Method 5§f: PUREX
Process depleted LEP ZIRNOX, MEP PWR, or MEN PWR fuel in the PUREX with §e250 mB§f schrabidic acid → yields schrabidium dust.
§bPros§f: Automatable, provides technetium
§bCons§f: Requires schrabidic acid (gated behind fusion)

§cWarning§f: Schrabidium is radioactive at §e15 RAD/s§f per ingot and causes temporary blindness when held without tier 3 hazmat protection!

§eTip§f: For bulk production, build a particle accelerator with Higgs Boson capability. For early access, use the nuclear explosion method with a small nuke near stacked uranium ore behind a concrete wall.
